ViperIDE

MicroPython Web IDE
by Volodymyr Shymanskyy

Modified for distribution with Data Foundry: removed analytics and update check, and added custom template scripts.

If you like ViperIDE, please give it a GitHub star ⭐ and spread the word on social media 📢

You can also report a bug 🐞
